description_long: This is a medium-sized utility trailer with a rectangular wooden cargo bed framed by a sturdy metal structure. The trailer features two large, black, side-mounted wheels and a metal tow bar at the front, equipped with a hitch and a support jack for stability when not attached to a vehicle. The wooden bed is bordered by metal rails, providing containment for transported goods, and the surface appears slightly textured, indicating a natural wood grain. The rear of the trailer includes reflectors and a license plate holder, enhancing its visibility and compliance for road use. The metal frame and tow bar are finished in a matte gray, contrasting with the dark brown wood panels. This trailer is designed for hauling various items in urban environments, such as tools, equipment, or garden waste.
description: A medium-sized utility trailer with a wooden cargo bed, metal frame, two side-mounted wheels, and a front tow bar with hitch and support jack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal tow bar, hitch, and support jack, with the wooden cargo bed and side wheels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden bed, the large black wheel, and the metal frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the wooden bed, reflectors, and license plate holder, with both wheels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other wheel and the metal tow bar extending forward.
attribute_handle_type: straight metal tow bar with hitch
attribute_wheel_position: dual side-mounted, centered along the length
